args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street%' AND lower(title) LIKE '%hype%' AND lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%' AND lower(artist) LIKE '%maginnis%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street%' AND lower(title) LIKE '%hype%' AND lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%' AND lower(artist) LIKE '%maginnis%';

result.preview: [{"track_id": "4122", "title": "Street Hype", "artist": "Brucqe Maginnis", "album": "Groove City", "year": "2005"}, {"track_id": "4628", "title": "Street Hype - Groove City", "artist": "Bruce Maginnis", "album": "None", "year": "'05"}, {"track_id": "14080", "title": "011-Street Hype", "artist": "Bruce Maginnis", "album": "Groove City (2005)", "year": "None"}]

args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street%' AND lower(title) LIKE '%hype%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street%' AND lower(title) LIKE '%hype%';

args.query: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS total_revenue_usd FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 14080) GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue_usd DESC;

exec_args.sql: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS total_revenue_usd FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 14080) GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue_usd DESC;

result.preview: "iTunes \u2014 $505.61 total revenue (USD) from Brucqe Maginnis\u2019 \u2018\u2018Street Hype\u2019\u2019 across all countries."

args.answer: iTunes — $505.61 total revenue (USD) from Brucqe Maginnis’ ‘‘Street Hype’’ across all countries.
